title: Ugly
tmdbOverview: When a 10-year old girl goes missing, her stepfather races against time to investigate the kidnapping. Can he find her before it's too late?
synopsis: Ugly (2013) is a thriller, drama and mystery film from India. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a A certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
